title: senna oblongifolia
intro: Senna oblongifolia is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna oblongifolia include promoting bowel movements, relieving constipation, and supporting digestive health. Senna oblongifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its effects.
